notes: Pre-release manual grade per DEC-014 of plans/super/141-claude-skill-install.md. Maintainer crafts an EvalSpec tailored to the SignalForge skill (the auto-generated init template is boilerplate and grades noise-against-noise), runs the grade command above, and replaces this file with the resulting score, version (signalforge.__version__), and ISO-8601 UTC graded_at timestamp.
